'''nojathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacciniform|vacciniform]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-j-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacciniform|vacciniform]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nojathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nojathithi|nojathithi]] || [[word:nojathiji|nojathiji]] || [[word:nojathishi|nojathishi]] || [[word:nojathiki|nojathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nojathuthuthu|nojathuthuthu]] || [[word:nojathujuju|nojathujuju]] || [[word:nojathushushu|nojathushushu]] || [[word:nojathukuku|nojathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nojathuthu|nojathuthu]] || [[word:nojathuju|nojathuju]] || [[word:nojathushu|nojathushu]] || [[word:nojathuku|nojathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nojathufthuf|nojathufthuf]] || [[word:nojathufjuf|nojathufjuf]] || [[word:nojathufshuf|nojathufshuf]] || [[word:nojathufkuf|nojathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nojathethe|nojathethe]] || [[word:nojatheje|nojatheje]] || [[word:nojatheshe|nojatheshe]] || [[word:nojatheke|nojatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nojathothotho|nojathothotho]] || [[word:nojathojojo|nojathojojo]] || [[word:nojathoshosho|nojathoshosho]] || [[word:nojathokoko|nojathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nojathotho|nojathotho]] || [[word:nojathojo|nojathojo]] || [[word:nojathosho|nojathosho]] || [[word:nojathoko|nojathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nojathofthof|nojathofthof]] || [[word:nojathofjof|nojathofjof]] || [[word:nojathofshof|nojathofshof]] || [[word:nojathofkof|nojathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nojathĂŻfthĂŻf|nojathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nojathĂŻfjĂŻf|nojathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nojathĂŻfshĂŻf|nojathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nojathĂŻfkĂŻf|nojathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nojathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|nojathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nojathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|nojathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nojathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|nojathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nojathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|nojathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nojathĂŻfthĂŻf|nojathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nojathĂŻfjĂŻf|nojathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nojathĂŻfshĂŻf|nojathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nojathĂŻfkĂŻf|nojathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nojathĂŻfthĂŻf|nojathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nojathĂŻfjĂŻf|nojathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nojathĂŻfshĂŻf|nojathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nojathĂŻfkĂŻf|nojathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nojathĂŠthĂŠ|nojathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:nojathĂŠjĂŠ|nojathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:nojathĂŠshĂŠ|nojathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:nojathĂŠkĂŠ|nojathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nojathathatha|nojathathatha]] || [[word:nojathajaja|nojathajaja]] || [[word:nojathashasha|nojathashasha]] || [[word:nojathakaka|nojathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nojathatha|nojathatha]] || [[word:nojathaja|nojathaja]] || [[word:nojathasha|nojathasha]] || [[word:nojathaka|nojathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nojathafthaf|nojathafthaf]] || [[word:nojathafjaf|nojathafjaf]] || [[word:nojathafshaf|nojathafshaf]] || [[word:nojathafkaf|nojathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nojathasha|nojathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nojathshĂ«asha|nojathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nojathroasha|nojathroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nojathmuasha|nojathmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nojathyaasha|nojathyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonojathnkshĂ«asha|gonojathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonojathnkroasha|gonojathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonojathnkmuasha|gonojathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonojathnkyaasha|gonojathnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nojajathasha|nojajathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nojajathshĂ«asha|nojajathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nojajathroasha|nojajathroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nojajathmuasha|nojajathmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nojajathyaasha|nojajathyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonojajathnkshĂ«asha|gonojajathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonojajathnkroasha|gonojajathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonojajathnkmuasha|gonojajathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonojajathnkyaasha|gonojajathnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nejĂŠthasha|nejĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nejĂŠthshĂ«asha|nejĂŠthshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nejĂŠthroasha|nejĂŠthroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nejĂŠthmuasha|nejĂŠthmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nejĂŠthyaasha|nejĂŠthyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonejĂŠthnkshĂ«asha|gonejĂŠthnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonejĂŠthnkroasha|gonejĂŠthnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonejĂŠthnkmuasha|gonejĂŠthnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonejĂŠthnkyaasha|gonejĂŠthnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nojfathasha|nojfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nojfathshĂ«asha|nojfathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nojfathroasha|nojfathroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nojfathmuasha|nojfathmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nojfathyaasha|nojfathyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonojfathnkshĂ«asha|gonojfathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonojfathnkroasha|gonojfathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonojfathnkmuasha|gonojfathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonojfathnkyaasha|gonojfathnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
